comment: Synthetic metastatic CRC, 51F, ECOG 0, right-sided ascending-colon primary, MSI-H / dMMR confirmed by IHC (MLH1/PMS2 loss) and PCR. Engine routes ALGO-CRC-METASTATIC-1L step 1 → RF-CRC-MSI-H-ACTIONABILITY fires (msi_status=MSI-H, dmmr_status=deficient) → IND-CRC-METASTATIC-1L-MSI-H-PEMBRO (pembrolizumab monotherapy, KEYNOTE-177 mPFS 16.5 vs 8.2 mo over FOLFOX+bev). MSI-H supersedes RAS / BRAF / sidedness routing per algorithm step 1 priority. Lynch-syndrome workup recommended downstream (MLH1 promoter methylation testing → if absent, germline NGS panel).
